programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: The House Hunt/ Dolphin Games
programme.desc: Splash, Bubbles and their best friends Dunk and Ripple go on epic adventures.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Hot Springs Eternal/ Tooey’s Hero
programme.desc: It’s a cold winter and Molly is set on discovering a hot springs Grandpa Nat once found in a blizzard. Tooey’s hero, dog musher Eugene Pike, is recreating a historic mail run across interior Alaska.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mary Shelley/ I Am Harry Houdini
programme.desc: Xavier goes back in time to meet spooky storyteller Mary Shelley before a Nature Troop campout.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Guitar to Sitar/ Spring Has Not Sprung
programme.desc: In Delhi, Carmen goes looking for guitar strings so she can write her mother a birthday song, but in the process, she and the kids learn about a different stringed instrument called a sitar.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Baby Problem/ The Sparkling Sphere Problem
programme.desc: Babysitters Peg and Cat rescue a baby fox from the top of his block tower. Peg and Cat are knights at the Round Table and must find the Wizard Ramone before he floats away.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Gets a Shot/ A Stormy Night
programme.desc: Daniel is scared to get a shot at the doctor's, but he finds that the shot was not so bad after all!

programme.title: Sesame Street: Walking the Dog
programme.desc: Elmo wants to be a dog walker just like Dog Walker Grover. His friends help him practice by pretending to be different kinds of dogs.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Garden Gnome Party/ Scooter Boy
programme.desc: Norman learns a dance for a garden gnome party with the help of Edna the gnome, Pinkalicious, and Peter.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Desserts
programme.desc: Learn why sweet challenges mean a bitter end for one baker as the six battle for a spot in the quarter final. The signature has them rolling out their skills; the technical is a tricky French dessert; the showstopper is a bit of a mousse marathon.

programme.title: Doc Martin: From the Mouth of Babes
programme.desc: James is teething, nothing seems to be working and nobody is getting any sleep. In desperation, Martin and Louisa agree to try Mel's suggestion of amber beads. They appear to be working, until James ends up getting a bead stuck up his nose.

programme.title: Doc Martin: From the Mouth of Babes
programme.desc: James is teething, nothing seems to be working and nobody is getting any sleep. In desperation, Martin and Louisa agree to try Mel's suggestion of amber beads. They appear to be working, until James ends up getting a bead stuck up his nose.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries: A Foreign Field
programme.desc: A man returns home after many years to take over his father's medical practice.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: An encounter with Daphne leaves Leslie pondering the possibility of fatherhood. Margo moves in with Theo, and Louisa is on the receiving end of some slightly confused romantic advances.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Never Forget I Love You
programme.desc: When the decapitated body of a woman found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle, Lindsay fears his relationship with the group may hinder his ability to approach the case objectively.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God
programme.desc: A doctor with personal connections to Voight is under investigation when four of his patients are committed to Chicago Med after an overdose of chemo.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out
programme.desc: After a luxury condo is robbed, the team is shocked to learn that not only was the family fast asleep when the crime occurred, but their teenaged daughter was violated during the invasion as well.

programme.title: Modern Family: Frank's Wedding
programme.desc: Frank's roaring 20s-themed wedding day is finally here, and to get into the spirit, Phil gets the Dunphy clan to show up in costume. Once Claire and the kids realize they are the only ones dressed-up, they feel it's time for an intervention with Phil.

programme.title: Modern Family: All Things Being Equal
programme.desc: Gloria, Claire, Haley, Alex, Lily, Luke and Manny are equally committed to showing their support for gender equality and the women's movement in very different ways.

programme.title: Modern Family: Alone Time
programme.desc: Everyone deserves a little alone time now and then, so when Mitch and Jay separately seek out a much-needed retreat from the family and end up at the same resort, it becomes clear just how 'related' they really are.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Graduates
programme.desc: In the season finale, Manny's father, Javier, shows up for his graduation and takes him out on a wild night of celebration, and then Jay steps in to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lake Life
programme.desc: Jay forces the family to take their vacation on a houseboat on a lake in an effort to create memories that will last long after he's gone. Meanwhile, Mitchell runs into an old flame that opens some old wounds.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Phil and Claire realize that Alex may be more self-sufficient in college than they give her credit for when they drop in for a quick visit.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Kolcheck, A.
programme.desc: Callen and Sam search for answers when they find crew members from the missing oil tanker used in Arkady's deal with Russia and also discover Arkady's personal connection to the ship.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Chernoff, K.
programme.desc: The case involving Arkady and his personal connection to an oil tanker now leads Callen, Sam, Deeks and Kensi to Moscow, where they must assume many undercover identities to locate their suspect. Meanwhile, Callen uncovers new information about his dad.

programme.title: Dateline: The Women and Dirty John

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets on the Emerald Coast

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Blazer of Glory
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers complete their transformation on an old K5 Blazer and square body truck bed into the ultimate diesel-powered party on wheels. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave convinces Heavy D to give his El Camino what she needs to get back on the road.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle any terrain in style. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave adds the finishing touches to his dream El Camino before revealing it at Monster Jam.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Trucked Out: Midnight Mission
programme.desc: Trucked Out with insider facts and extra scenes: Heavy D assigns Diesel Dave and The Muscle a secret late-night mission at the spooky overflow lot. As they remember the builds they have done throughout the years, completing their task becomes difficult.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Wet Reveal and Dirty Races
programme.desc: In the epic season finale, the Diesel Brothers reveal their most ambitious build ever and finally get down and dirty in their race against the Dirty 7.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Street Racing Machine
programme.desc: The DeBertis take on the ambitious task of turning a mid-size truck into a one-of-a-kind street racing machine that can switch seamlessly from drifting to road racing. The job could launch a new custom parts business but may require the team to relocate.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Wet Reveal and Dirty Races
programme.desc: In the epic season finale, the Diesel Brothers reveal their most ambitious build ever and finally get down and dirty in their race against the Dirty 7.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Street Racing Machine
programme.desc: The DeBertis take on the ambitious task of turning a mid-size truck into a one-of-a-kind street racing machine that can switch seamlessly from drifting to road racing. The job could launch a new custom parts business but may require the team to relocate.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Armed with what's left of an avalanche victim's gear, Dave and Cody show how to survive in the harsh Rocky Mountains. Facing sub-zero temperatures, they make their way down a jagged ice waterfall, build a snow cave and try to salvage a dead elk carcass.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take only a poncho, a specimen jar, and a broken lighter with them to take on the wet cloud forests of Panama.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Cody and Dave take on a survival scenario in South Africa's backcountry where dehydration kills in hours and hungry super-predators kill even faster. Armed with nothing but a machete, they show how to escape the bush without getting eaten alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Up the River
programme.desc: In Kentucky, Dave and Cody take on a scenario of two kayakers who are dumped into the cold river just a few hours before sundown. To make things worse, they become separated from each other by two miles of rushing river. Then, Dave traps an irate skunk.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bitten
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how to survive the rugged jungle in Thailand using only the gear an ill-equipped ecotourist might carry for a day trek: a Thai jungle knife, steel wool, a sharpening stone, a damaged cell phone and a bag of tobacco.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Man Up or Bow Out
programme.desc: Trying to survive 21 days completely solo, All-Star survivalist Luke McLaughlin takes on the dangerous badlands of South Africa. Stalked by ferocious lions and hyenas, Luke must get a kill if he has a chance to finish the challenge.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Land of Monsters
programme.desc: Snake hunter Dusty Crum wages war on thousands of invasive pythons killing the Everglades, backed by his one-of-a-kind team of snake hunters.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fists Full of Snakes
programme.desc: Dusty and his team mount a critical hunt from a swamp buggy before racing south to the python-infested Ten Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Snakes in the Dark
programme.desc: Dusty leads the team to an abandoned missile factory near the epicenter of the snake epidemic that could hold the biggest concentration of pythons in the Everglades.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Enter the Super Snake
programme.desc: Dusty and team discover a frightening new hybrid Python species when they trek deep into the dense Python Pines to prevent the snakes from laying their eggs.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Dusty vs The Monster
programme.desc: When a potentially record-breaking python escapes Dusty's grasp, his obsession to catch it brings him face to face with the massive reptile in the most dangerous solo mission of his career.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Showtime
programme.desc: It's a star studded premiere as Jenna and Val from Dancing with the Stars waltz into Kleinfeld to find her dream dress. WWE Hall of Famer Mick Foley steps out of the ring to help his friend Heather find a last minute dress after hers is ruined.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Not on the Guest List
programme.desc: Kayla comes to Kleinfeld with her family to find her dream wedding dress but with one catch; they're not invited to the wedding! Dori wants to show her own style with a new dress while mom and Mama Dolly strongly encourage her to wear their 1950s gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Crazy Uncle Randy
programme.desc: Tracey's determined to find a black gown but mom says no and insists on calling in Tracey's fiancé to back her up in the fight for white! Randy's niece Danielle is getting married and the pressure is on her 'crazy uncle' to find her the perfect dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Oh My God! Welcome to My Home!
programme.desc: Randy officially kicks off his 'SAY YES AMERICA' tour. When he shows up at unsuspecting Katie's front door she gets the shock of her life. Bride Dana wants to flash her tats on the wedding day but her conservative entourage won't go down without a fight.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Watch Party: The Truth Shall Set You Free
programme.desc: Michael and Juliana discuss a potential prenup. Angela goes wedding gown shopping. Emily and Sasha arrive in the U.S. Robert and Anny go apartment hunting. Anna gives Mursel an ultimatum before their wedding. Natalie panics about Mike.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: I Don't Have a Choice
programme.desc: Anna reveals big news to her family. Angela fights for Michael's visa. Syngin needs more from Tania. Mike has tough questions for Natalie. Betsy grills Sasha about his past. Anny cries shopping for a wedding dress. Blake's mom tries to bond with Jasmin.

programme.title: Sister Wives: PolygaMexicamist Wedding
programme.desc: Mykelti's polygamist family ties the knot with Tony's Mexican Catholic family through a one-of-a-kind winter wedding. It's freezing cold and Christine forgets to bring Kody's shirts.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Amanda
programme.desc: Stacy and Clinton show Amanda, who likes to dress like a man, a value of feminine style.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Mayim
programme.desc: Stacy and Clinton nominate former child star Mayim Bialik from the hit TV show 'Blossom'. Her kooky style was acceptable then but now the frumpy mom needs an updated look.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dominique's severe addiction to food prevented her from losing enough pounds to have weight loss surgery. This single mom of six continues to struggle with her diet.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Nose No Bounds
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Overtaken by Puppets
programme.desc: Once a professional ventriloquist, Donna's career became an obsession with hundreds of puppets in her home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Are You Serious?
programme.desc: Hoarding has destroyed Carol's relationship with her daughter and she has one final chance to clean up. Amy's years of collecting have turned into a massive hoard.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brandon's Story
programme.desc: Brandon is a talented musician with a beautiful voice and a run-away weight problem. He wants more than to lose weight, he wants a career and he wants to take the next step with his girlfriend Taylor whom he risks losing if he can't make a change.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Keyshia Cole
programme.desc: Rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some 'Qualified Rollers,' marvel at people who use 'No Hands,' and laugh at 'Craptical Jokers.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXLIV
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel drop their cars off at The Slop Shop, find out who thinks they're Above the Law, and harness the power of Steel Wool.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: T-Pain
programme.desc: Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to sweeten the sound of people's slams in 'T-Pain your Pain' and talks about 'hard 180s.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXIII

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The Prodigal Son
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Atz Sr. take Jane on an epic hunt on horseback in the foothills. Eivin builds a one-of-a-kind motorized cart for Findlay. Otto, Charlotte, and August race to repair a fence breach after their cattle escape.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The Hardest Climb
programme.desc: A horse gets tangled in electric wire. Eivin and Levi go rock climbing to secure access to a valuable new hunting ground. Atz Sr. takes Bonnie on a hunting date.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Cold, Hard Decisions
programme.desc: Otto and August radio Eivin for rescue after facing an emergency at sea. Atz Senior must decide between life on the Yuletide and returning to the family homestead. Atz Lee puts Jane's homesteading skills to the test with a wilderness scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The Last Hunt
programme.desc: With the Constructor dead in the water, it's up to Otto and his crew of family and friends to save the invaluable boat for future use. Eivin takes novice hunter Levi on a last chance hunt to Shuyak Island to stockpile deer meat for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: Puppy Bowl's Best Nappers
programme.desc: We're recounting the greatest moments from all the furry-ious years of puppies at play.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: New Beginnings on Perl Island
programme.desc: As spring arrives, Atz Lee and Atz Sr. travel to Perl island to find feasible land for their cattle. The Constructor is surveyed and salvaged through a risky maneuver, and Jane constructs an innovative dog sled for Atz Lee.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: While Billy and Ami are in California, it is up to the rest of the wolf pack to finish the barn. With winter quickly approaching, tensions rise when they need Bam's help to finish the task but he is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Summer's arrival signals the threat of wildfires. Bird, Gabe and Rain work tirelessly to finish the barn before a fire ban is issued, and Billy and Ami finally return with an important health update.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: New Beginnings on Perl Island
programme.desc: As spring arrives, Atz Lee and Atz Sr. travel to Perl island to find feasible land for their cattle. The Constructor is surveyed and salvaged through a risky maneuver, and Jane constructs an innovative dog sled for Atz Lee.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: While Billy and Ami are in California, it is up to the rest of the wolf pack to finish the barn. With winter quickly approaching, tensions rise when they need Bam's help to finish the task but he is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wild Life: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Summer's arrival signals the threat of wildfires. Bird, Gabe and Rain work tirelessly to finish the barn before a fire ban is issued, and Billy and Ami finally return with an important health update.

programme.title: Mysterious Wilds of India
programme.desc: From a gibbon with a human family to the last Asiatic lions in the world strolling along its coast, India is filled with inspiring stories from the wild species that call it home.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Casper: The White Crocodile
programme.desc: Steve and his team relocate 11 of the feistiest crocodiles to their new pond at the zoo.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluffy Puppies and Baby Goats
programme.desc: Six fluffy Coton de Tulear puppies and a goat are the newest additions to a farmhouse.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Chloe the Bully
programme.desc: Jordan and Julie are newlyweds, each with their own cat. What should be a happy time in their lives has turned into a nightmare because Jordan's cat is bullying Julie's cat.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Friends for Life
programme.desc: Dr Jeff battles to fix a German Shepherd's broken elbow and get him back to his worried owner, a disabled war veteran. A cat with a swollen bladder needs difficult surgery to save its life. And Dr Baier and Hector head to an exotic bird sanctuary.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hog Wild and Home Free
programme.desc: The time has come for Dr. Ross and Tauvia to move out of his momma's house. Dr. Lavigne makes a life or death decision with Diesel, a mastiff who could have a toy lodged in his intestines. Dr. Blue sees a pig with an affection for household furniture.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot King Cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Let Go
programme.desc: The police need Villalobos' help when a woman in the French Quarter is rushed to the hospital, leaving her dogs behind. A recent divorcee from Alabama visits the rescue to help fill the void in his home. Favourite dog, Rhino, faces a health crisis.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return
programme.desc: Country Matt returns to help his brother, a new parolee, overcome his fear of dogs. Earl and Tia's daughter-in-law race to save a stray running loose in scorching temperatures. A couple of empty nesters visit VRC in search of a new friend.

programme.title: Movie: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Aaron's father's funeral turns into chaos when his extended family arrives. An uncle complains about his daughter's boyfriend, a cousin inadvertently gives her fiancé LSD, and family secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Out of Time
programme.desc: A Florida police chief must solve a double murder before he himself falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Movie: Alex Cross
programme.desc: A homicide detective is tested when a skilled serial killer inflicts pain and torture on his victims.

programme.title: Martin: Kicked to the Curb
programme.desc: Martin and Gina end up homeless when their old apartment is sublet and the deal on the new one falls through . Desperate to recover their old place, they try to scare away the new tenants.

programme.title: Martin: The Best of Martin
programme.desc: Tisha Campbell hosts this clip show of the best of the last 99 episodes. Included are many of the special moments from the show, outtakes, and Tisha's own insight into the laughter behind the series.

programme.title: Martin: The Love Jones Connection
programme.desc: Sheneneh appears as a contestant on a dating game show and gets a lot more than a date.

programme.title: Martin: Where the Party At?
programme.desc: Martin gets a big surprise on his birthday - no one wants to come to his party.

programme.title: Martin: Homeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Martin steps in at a local production and does a homeboy version of Shakespeare's play.

programme.title: Martin: The Cabin Show
programme.desc: Martin and Pam get lost during a hiking trip, leaving Gina and Tommy to search for them.

programme.title: Martin: The Tooth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Pam undergoes hypnosis to overcome a fear, but wakes up with a different personality.

programme.desc: After a navy officer is found dead on a rural road, the team must ascertain if the murder was the result of a bar fight or because he knew too much about an attack on a fellow female officer. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and McGee start a juice cleanse.

programme.title: NCIS: Shooter
programme.desc: When a Marine photographer disappears prior to providing his testimony in an Army court-martial hearing, the NCIS team investigates both the murder he witnessed as well as his current piece on military veterans who are homeless.

programme.title: NCIS: The Admiral's Daughter
programme.desc: Director Vance gives DiNozzo a special assignment to bring home an Admiral’s daughter from Paris, but he must turn to his NCIS team for help after he enters a controversial crime scene.

programme.title: NCIS: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: The team investigates whether a fire on a U.S. Navy ship was accidental or an intentional diversion for an escape. Gibbs travels to his childhood home following the news of his father's passing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Bedfellows
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the mysterious deaths of two brothers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Country Crossover
programme.desc: When the body of a high-profile hip-hop producer is found dead outside his studio, a hit-and-run calls Dets. Logan and Wheeler to the scene. As the investigation continues, the list of suspects and motives grows ever longer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Masquerade
programme.desc: A former beauty queen, whose daughter was found murdered on Halloween night 1992, is thrown back into the public eye when a pedophile in exile confesses to the murder. However, Detectives Goren and Eames are not convinced that he is guilty.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Say Her Real Name
programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even
programme.desc: Intelligence responds to a drug robbery gone wrong and in their investigation it is revealed that the first person Voight ever gave his card to is linked to a double murder. Halstead discovers the real reason his brother came to Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's
programme.desc: The search is on for one of Chicago's most wanted after several dead teenage girls turn up in a Chinatown factory.

programme.title: Movie: Ted 2
programme.desc: After tying the knot, newlyweds Ted and Tami-Lyn are ready to start a family. They prepare for artificial insemination, but in order to gain custody of his child, Ted must go to court to prove that he's a person.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Streetcar Named Marge

programme.desc: Homer decides to forgo church and starts his own religion by spending Sundays reading Playdude and smoking cigars.

programme.desc: Dr. Pol certainly has a lot on his plate when a pit-bull is in for emergency surgery, a pair of pups run into a prickly porcupine, and Smoke the pet pig is attacked.

programme.desc: Popeye the therapy rabbit comes into Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth but leaves with a couple of dates when his owner, Jodi, persuades Dr. Pol to donate dinner with himself and Diane for a fundraiser.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Spacewalk of Doom
programme.desc: An astronaut on a spacewalk begins to drown.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin
programme.desc: Two suns photographed in the sky over Indonesia could be a trick of light, or the first sighting of the Sun's evil twin; NASA scientists are baffled by ghostly white swirls on the Moon's surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Milky Way is dying, and using the latest science and discoveries, experts are investigating what's killing it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Milky Way is dying, and using the latest science and discoveries, experts are investigating what's killing it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Friends Without Benefits

programme.title: 60 Days In: Shakedown

programme.title: 60 Days In: Alone for the Holidays

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: A year after a young teacher was gunned down outside of her Pennsylvania home, there is still no arrest and many wonder if this case will ever be solved.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: A year after a young teacher was gunned down outside of her Pennsylvania home, there is still no arrest and many wonder if this case will ever be solved.

programme.title: Love Kills: Matchmaker to Murder
programme.desc: When Damarius and his girlfriend Alyssa find out she's pregnant, the couple's parents are furious. The friction culminates in a terrible tragedy, resulting the arrest of Damarius. Weeks later, a surprising twist will reveal the couple's darkest secret.

programme.title: Love Kills: We Were Like Fire
programme.desc: When Judy and Duane meet, they both long for excitement and to escape the lives they live. Turns out, fate as more in store for them than they desire.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Man with Two Faces
programme.desc: Bloomington, Illinois Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. At home, he's a model father and husband. So when he's caught trespassing after midnight on a young woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Get Rich Quick
programme.desc: These women think their men are worth more dead than alive. A scorned Southern belle tries to cash in on her ex's life; a countess clings to her riches through violent means; and a mother of two trades her husband for another shot at the good life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: When these women exposed their true selves, their men found out they'd been 'Sleeping With The Enemy.' A beauty queen tried to free herself from family duties; an accountant's tryst turned deadly; and a valedictorian made sure her man coudn't leave.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cash In
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the chips are down when these Deadly Women decide to 'Cash In.'

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor

programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Builder Basic vs. Backwards Bungalow
programme.desc: A desperate married couple and two business-minded sisters compete for Scott's cash in a suburban face-off. When faced with the realities of both situations, he may need to forget the numbers and go with his gut.

programme.title: Buyers Bootcamp With Scott McGillivray: Charming Victorian vs. Shabby Semi
programme.desc: Scott has to decide between a massive Victorian fixer-upper and a dilapidated semi-detached. Both houses are in hot markets, and both have a ton of potential, but the rookie mistakes that have already been made will play a big part in his decision.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'tis The Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Mazu Takes a Chance/ The Lost Egg
programme.desc: Mazu must protect a helpless dragonfly from raptors; Rocky learns how to be gentle with an egg he's found.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Challenge / Giganto's Boss
programme.desc: The raptors challenge the Dinos to a game of basketball for the rights to the playground; Rocky convinces everyone he's the Giganto-Whisperer.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Big Surprise/ Meet the Beagles
programme.desc: Goofy struggles to keep Minnie's surprise for Mickey's birthday a secret. The Happy Helpers are asked to help a band get back together.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Dylan/ Armadylan'd and Dangerous
programme.desc: After stopping an asteroid from crashing into the city, Armadylan thinks he's one of the PJ Masks. Romeo tries to use Armadylan's powers to improve his lab.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Terrible Two-Some / Owlette's Luna Trouble
programme.desc: Gekko has to babysit his two teammates, Kitty Boy and Chiclet, and save the world. Owlette must put aside her jealous feelings to get back Luna Girl's board and magnet from Romeo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp
programme.desc: Mavis promises to have a spa day with Wendy and have lunch with the werewolf twins at the same time. Mavis wins two tickets to the phlegm ball fantasy camp.

programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.desc: The team must determine if the murder of a navy commander's wife is linked to her profession as a therapist, or an act of terrorism, after finding the commander's name on a Jihadist target list. Meanwhile, the team discusses Halloween costumes.

programme.title: NCIS: The Searchers

programme.desc: A businesswoman is gunned down in Hollywood; Brenda locks horns with the FBI while investigating the murder of an Iranian businessman.

programme.title: The Closer: Fatal Retraction
programme.desc: A botched murder investigation with faulty evidence is revealed after the body of a woman, believed to have been a murder victim of a death-row killer three years before, shows up in the morgue.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Road Rayge
programme.desc: Doug loses his license when he is coerced into cheating on the driver's test.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Supermarket Story
programme.desc: Doug, Carrie and Arthur endure chaos when they go shopping the day before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Noel Cowards
programme.desc: When their car breaks down, Doug and Carrie realize they will have to buy a new one.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Much to Doug's dismay, Carrie insists that his friend Spence needs a woman in his life.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Best Man
programme.desc: Doug attends a wedding after discovering that Carrie and the groom were once lovers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dog Days
programme.desc: The neighbour's dog barks at night, keeping Doug and Carrie awake.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Crappy Birthday
programme.desc: Carrie is so depressed about turning 30 that she doesn't even want to go out.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'ain't Valentine
programme.desc: Carrie forces her father, Arthur, to attend a seniors Valentine's Day dance.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.desc: After returning to the backwoods, Tickle mashes in his first batch of illegal shine in six seasons. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils. With Daniel on the mend, Mike quietly takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Teaming up with a former competitor, Mark and Digger sell their legacy shine in a neighbouring county. Mike and Jerry double their shine output only to find customers are getting their shine from another source. Mountain man Mark tracks an intruder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Josh builds a new still site with his secret stash. When a drone invades his airspace, he breaks out his shotgun. Daniel hits the jackpot selling shine for Mark and Digger.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Busted by the Law
programme.desc: Tim devises a plan to make backwoods shine with Tickle for the first time in years. Short on patience and a key ingredient, Mark and Digger's bootleg operation comes under threat. In a series first, two Tennessee shiners get busted by cops on camera.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Stranglehold
programme.desc: Dusty Crum and his team of snake hunters devise a plan to stop Florida's invasive pythons from spreading north and becoming a national emergency.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine in the Sky
programme.desc: Moonshine season is underway and shiners are eager to get product to market. Josh mashes in while awaiting Cutie Pie's fate. Mark and Digger struggle with materials building an experimental 3-Pot still. Chico and Sondra build a still high in the trees.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Busted by the Law
programme.desc: Tim devises a plan to make backwoods shine with Tickle for the first time in years. Short on patience and a key ingredient, Mark and Digger's bootleg operation comes under threat. In a series first, two Tennessee shiners get busted by cops on camera.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Stranglehold
programme.desc: Dusty Crum and his team of snake hunters devise a plan to stop Florida's invasive pythons from spreading north and becoming a national emergency.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Shiner's Last Stand

programme.title: Moonshiners: Prophecy Fulfilled
