programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: The Misery Index: We Got That D!

programme.title: The Misery Index: How Did It Get in There?

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect

programme.desc: Khloe pursues an acting career much to the dismay of Kim. Bruce gets a major style makeover.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris the Cheerleader
programme.desc: The girls teach Kendall about puberty while Kris tries out to be an adult cheerleader.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloe's Blind Dates
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney set up Khloe on blind dates. Kendall hires a handyman to help her with her chores.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Learning Self Defense
programme.desc: Break-ins at the store encourage the girls to learn self-defence while Rob drops out of college to become a model.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Integrative nutritionist Karina Heinrich shows us how to eat our way to six-pack abs.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: On the streets of New York, unsuspecting taxi passengers find themselves in the middle of a TV game show. They can either win money by answering a series of fun questions correctly, or they can answer three questions wrong and be sent out on the street.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy

programme.title: Chopped: Haricot Flair
programme.desc: Yes, we have no bananas. But we do have banana blossoms in the first basket and four women competing. The three chefs who make it to the entree round must work with a notoriously stinky ingredient.

programme.title: Chopped: Light Makes Right
programme.desc: The baskets are packed with healthy ingredients, from which the chefs will be creating delicious dishes that also happen to be nutritious and moderate in calories.

programme.title: Chopped: Healthy Rivalry
programme.desc: Four chefs are challenged to create light dishes from baskets full of nutritious surprises. In the first round, the competitors must make tasty fish dishes that include an unusual alternative carb.

programme.title: Chopped: Clean Eatin'
programme.desc: The chefs are instructed to make delicious healthy dishes that are suitable for someone who's watching their weight and concerned about nutrition. In the first round, some legumes legitimately confound some of the chefs.

programme.title: Chopped: The Light Stuff
programme.desc: Four fit chefs take on the challenge to cook creative, healthy dishes that are light on calories but big on flavor.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweet and Salty Success
programme.desc: The chefs get a sweet and salty theme and are tasked with perfectly harmonizing the quintessential flavour pairing on their plates. In the first round, the competitors must combine a Moroccan pie and a sugary take on bacon.

programme.title: Chopped: Eat Your Veggies

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Cooks So-Cal Style
programme.desc: Valerie and her longtime housekeeper, Elia, cook So-Cal style Mexican recipes, just they did when Wolfie was a little boy. They make Chicken Enchiladas with Classic Sauce, a "Casa Vega" Salad, Roasted Salsa and Smoky Margaritas with Mezcal.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Bertinelli: Ingredient Hunter!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Wine Club Party
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's dear friends, the Dinsmores, have a party twice a year for their wine club. Valerie has offered to cook for the party, knowing one of the guests is lactose-intolerant.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Turning Over a New Leaf

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: A Treehouse Production
programme.desc: Pete has spread the treehouse bug to a long-time friend and show producer who's hanging up his TV hat to open a treehouse B&B. The classic A-frame structure will have all the amenities and a waterfall that pours from the wraparound deck to the pond below.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard

programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey discover unlisted their Tuscan villa is missing a few ingredients. The kitchen has mysteriously been gutted, the in-ground pool is plagued with pests and the landscaping has overgrown its welcome.

programme.desc: Lindsey and Eric buy a property that is lacking in both function and form. To get top dollar, the flippers set out to rework the home's funky floor plan. They come across problems including a broken AC system and a cactus with a mean streak.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: From Pit to Poolside
programme.desc: Lindsey and Eric Bennett take on the challenge of reviving a midcentury modern home that was abandoned mid-renovation. They work with its vintage charm while adding modern comforts like a custom pool and fire pit to create a swank outdoor oasis.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Desert Farmhouse Flip
programme.desc: Lindsey and Eric think they've struck gold when they come across a property to flip in a desirable neighborhood with low inventory. But an easy in-and-out renovation gets messy when they run into some unexpected and costly complications.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Land of Fire
programme.desc: Explore the fiery heart of Hawaii, from volcanic eruptions to spiders that smile, fish that climb and turtles that bury secrets in a landscape that defies expectations.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom
programme.desc: Southern Thailand is a place of both spectacular natural beauty and unexpected surprise - where spirituality pervades every bit of life. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Brazil: The Jaguar's Lair
programme.desc: The Pantanal switches from grassland to swamp and back each year with the seasonal rains; it is one of the most dramatic changes of any habitat on earth. Meet the jaguars that rule this beautiful and bizarre world.

programme.title: Secret Brazil: Cannibal Caimans
programme.desc: A yearlong adventure capturing exotic creatures and extreme conditions of the wetland.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Baby Watch
programme.desc: Everyone at the zoo is waiting for the big event: the birth of Zuri the giraffe's baby.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Later, Gator!
programme.desc: A new sloth bear has major lung issues, and a gator breaks out of restraints in an exam.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Polar Bear Palooza
programme.desc: The staff throws a polar bear party and Priya works with her husband on a shark exam.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ruff Day at the Office
programme.desc: It’s ready, set, VET as Dr. Pol and the other vets race to take on emergency after emergency in one frantic Friday.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Chubby Bunny
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic is packed to the gills with a mini-pig, giant bunny, pregnant dog and a busted hen.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Black and White and Pol All Over
programme.desc: A swift kick from a horse forces Charles to sit out on farm calls, so it’s up to Diane to fill his coveralls as the original dynamic duo of Dr. and Mrs. Pol helps a zany little zebra, castrate a powerful racehorse, and treat a cow with teat trouble.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Dreams
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is fielding farm calls all over Isabella County now that the spring birthing season is in full swing.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: One Ocean
programme.desc: Six breath-taking images, six unfathomable mysteries; from a gigantic tsunami hundreds of feet high that never hits land, to a secret underground base in China and has an image from space finally revealed the location of the Garden of Eden?

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets in the Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the world's greatest and most mysterious marvels, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering innovations, experts reveal what it would take to build the ancient wonder today.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Battle of Brooklyn Bridge
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology, and modern-day science to reveal if building possibly the most important bridge in the world, New York's Brooklyn Bridge, a second time would be just as deadly as the first time.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Himalayan Mega Train
programme.desc: Engineers braved a deadly Himalayan environment to build this world's tallest railway, which connects one of the world's most inaccessibly cities to the world beyond the ice.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood Brothers: The Derek and Alex King Case
programme.desc: Witness the shocking story of how two young Florida boys were led to kill their father.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: Breakdown at Daylight
programme.desc: 17-year old Casey Crowder vanished early one Sunday morning after her car ran out of gas outside of Dumas, Arkansas. With no leads and no witnesses, investigators are desperate to find any CCTV cameras that can lead them to the missing teen.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Call Me Back, Chris
programme.desc: In February 2008, Christopher Duncan left his apartment in San Antonio Texas, never to return again. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage has the potential to reveal the identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Thirty-one year old Nikki McPhatter is a self-made success story Navy veteran and MBA graduate with a close circle of friends. She's only missing love. When she disappears, detectives follow a trail that leads them into the dark lair of a killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Thirty-one year old Nikki McPhatter is a self-made success story Navy veteran and MBA graduate with a close circle of friends. She's only missing love. When she disappears, detectives follow a trail that leads them into the dark lair of a killer.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Kill Me Twice
programme.desc: Allentown, PA loses all sense of security when a calculated serial killer starts preying on unsuspecting women in the middle of the night. When one woman refuses to be his next victim, the killer goes on a relentless tirade that ends in his own demise.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Last Call
programme.desc: Two young mothers living hundreds of miles apart vanish under eerily similar circumstances. Years pass without a single lead in either case until a Missouri police officer's routine house call uncovers the most unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: The 'Curse' Begins at Christmas
programme.desc: In 1989, in peaceful Dryden, New York, a Christmastime massacre claims an entire family. Just when it seems the horror has passed, terror visits Dryden again. With these events, a so-called "curse" will descend on Dryden for ten years.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: Thirteen Days in Winter
programme.desc: For thirteen days in winter, the Dryden community searches for a little girl missing in the blinding snow. Not even the police suspect the horrible truth. Three years later, the 'curse' of Dryden returns when a love triangle turns to murder.

programme.title: Village of the Damned: Dryden's Dark Soul
programme.desc: As Dryden's dark cloud, two love stories turn to tragedy. In 1993, a woman awakes to see one friend murder another in a fit of jealous rage. Just a year later, Dryden's beloved football coach crosses paths with his daughter's deranged ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Assassination of Maurizio Gucci
programme.desc: Maurizio Gucci, the former head of the iconic fashion house, has just sold his shares in the company and divorced his wife. With a new love of his life and new business ventures, Maurizio's murder is less a case of who wanted him dead, but who didn't.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: Outgoing Jackie Galloway is found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots. Police investigate suspects in her inner circle but are shocked when a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to discover the murderer is a budding serial killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Devil Went Down to Georgia
programme.desc: After a recent encounter with a peeping tom outside his daughter's bedroom window and another with a masked man in his own hallway, Jerry Glaser thinks someone is trying to kill him and takes his life into his own hands to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Two teenagers in love go missing from rural Ohio. Ten days later, they both turn up dead - brutally hacked to bits. The crime tears the small town apart and remains unsolved for 25 years, until the shocking truth comes to light.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Home Invasion
programme.desc: 26-year-old Julie Curry Boyd took the steps to separate her and her children from a marriage of 13 years. A sudden threat finds Julie desperate but determined to keep her family safe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Legacy
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. A family legacy cabin in the Wrangell Mountains, a guest cabin in Eagle Song, and an island getaway on Shelter Island.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Frozen Highway
programme.desc: Adam and his family stake out the area for their Family Legacy cabin. Mike and his daughter finally make it off Alaska's frozen highway, only to have their build stuck in neutral. Dave and Hans complete 20 supply runs and dig holes for the foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bump Outs and Burls
programme.desc: Alaskan builder Adam Tschappat's team is cut in half due to volunteer firefighter duties delaying his Family Legacy cabin build in the Wrangell Mountains. Mike Williams is facing a 100 degree change in temperature that forces him to focus on the farm.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hello Hoonah
programme.desc: Builder Adam Tschappat and his brothers deal with record-breaking spring temperatures. Mike Williams is keeping one eye on his crops and the other on his build. Dave and Hans nearly get stranded due to receding tides.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Builder Mike Williams is in a mad scramble to save his peonies from dying. Dave and Hans's 50 thousand pounds of material make it to shore unharmed. Builder Adam Tschappat does some precision work from 2 logs to 12 logs high for his Family Legacy cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Whackin' and Stackin'
programme.desc: Builder Mike Williams' plans to catch up backfire while preparing the cabin structure for earthquakes. Dave and Hans start laying the floor while having fun at their client's expense. Builder Adam Tschappat battles 100 years of brush for his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Plywood Don't Lie
programme.desc: Mike and his team gain some ground and try to keep it while laying plywood. Dave and Hans try and get reacquainted with their build. Adam comes face to face with his biggest fear for his cabin's success.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Cody Saves the Day
programme.desc: Mike’s son Cody comes up with a fix for their pressure washer problem in order to peel logs. Dave and Hans work through extreme weather fluctuations. Adam is a bag short of cement to complete the foundation for his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lofty Goals
programme.desc: Mike Williams gets all 45 of his logs peeled and starts to stack and insulate his cabin. Dave and Hans deal with dangerous heavy fog on their boat journey to Shelter Island. Adam saves the day with an extra bag of cement.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pig Out
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is going hog wild for the most insane pig roasts in the country.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Seafood

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Extreme
programme.desc: It's time to go big or go home with Roger Mooking as he explores the most extreme dishes. The featured chefs are creating the most jaw-dropping, spectacular dishes on the food scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY

programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Beaker 2.0/When You Wish Upon a Rizzo
programme.desc: Bunsen creates a Beaker 2.0; The Muppet Babies are visited by Rizzo the Genie.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Everybody Wash Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Where's Mickey? / Cuckoo in Hot Dog Hills!
programme.desc: Mickey helps Mayor McBeagle install a Flammer Jammer into his car. Cuckoo Loca's cousins visit from Paris.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Hauntley Girls/ The Not So Haunted House
programme.desc: A magical book that wreaks havoc is accidentally selected as Vee's first book club read. The girls come up with a haunted plan to keep people from wanting to buy Poppy's house.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: FlyAlong/RockABye Birdie
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Campy Camper Day!/ Founder's Day Flounder!
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Butterfly Brigade/ Owlette the Winner
programme.desc: Blaming her moths for past defeats, Luna Girl steals a swarm of butterflies to be her new sidekick. Luna Girl and Owlette compete to win the biggest and best toy.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Dylan/ Armadylan'd and Dangerous
programme.desc: After stopping an asteroid from crashing into the city, Armadylan thinks he's one of the PJ Masks. Romeo tries to use Armadylan's powers to improve his lab.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Grandpa Camp / A Backyard Divided
programme.desc: It's grandparent's day and since Fozzie has never met his grandparents, Kermit finds two people to fill in for him, Statler and Waldorf. Later, when Gonzo and Piggy can't seem to get along, they divide the backyard into two separate kingdoms.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Blanket Fort/ Playground Pirates
programme.desc: Summer and Piggy surprise their friends by building a blanket fort so large that it becomes a blanket kingdom. When Miss Nanny loses her earring, the Muppet Babies use their imaginations to turn into pirates and follow a treasure map to find it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy No More/ Gekko Vs. Splatcano
programme.desc: After Romeo steals Catboy's powers, Catboy must learn to be a superhero without any super powers.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Terrible Two-Some / Owlette's Luna Trouble
programme.desc: Gekko has to babysit his two teammates, Kitty Boy and Chiclet, and save the world. Owlette must put aside her jealous feelings to get back Luna Girl's board and magnet from Romeo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Clubhouse Rocks
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Band Concert
programme.desc: The Sensational Six Polka Band is planning to provide the musical accompaniment for the baby elephants' dance performance.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Great Muppet Sport-a-Thon/ You Say Potato, I Say Best Friend
programme.desc: The gang puts on a sporting competition but Piggy keeps losing! The Muppet Babies are confused when Gonzo becomes best friends with a potato.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Good, The Bad, and the Froggy/ Muppet Rock
programme.desc: The Muppet Babies go on a Wild West adventure. The Muppet Babies form their own rock band.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: It's Wiki Wiki Time/ Happy Hula Helpers!
programme.desc: Donald's Hawaiian vacation is interrupted when the rest of the gang arrives for a big relay race. The Happy Helpers are tasked with teaching a hula dance for a birthday celebration.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Trouble at Floochi's!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Masquerade
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals help Minnie get ready for her Masquerade Ball before donning their favourite costumes for Professor Von Drake's big Clubhouse Costume Show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race
programme.desc: Mickey helps Donald fly in the Big Balloon Race so he can win a big blue ribbon. They use stickers to patch up the balloon and an elephant helps weigh the balloon down after it flies into orbit. Later, they rescue Pete, who's stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Chef Goofy on the Go!
programme.desc: Let's ride with Mickey helping Chef Goofy On the Go serve up food far and wide.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Aye, Aye Captain Mickey
programme.desc: Mickey and the Clubhouse pals board Professor Von Drake's new submarine for an underwater adventure.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pluto and the Pup / Trouble at Floochi's!
programme.desc: Pluto becomes upset with a stowaway pup Mickey unknowingly brings to the garage. The Happy Helpers help when a pair of diamond shoes are swapped at the shoe store for another pair!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Biggest Heist Ever/ Thrillin' Hilda!
programme.desc: After Von Drake invents a truck to carry all the Roadsters, Commander Heist steals it. Hilda asks the Happy Helpers to help her find a new sport to play.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Challenge / Giganto's Boss
programme.desc: The raptors challenge the Dinos to a game of basketball for the rights to the playground; Rocky convinces everyone he's the Giganto-Whisperer.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Biggest Hero / Think Quick
programme.desc: Rocky gets jealous when Tiny suddenly becomes the go-to hero! Mazu may be a slow runner but is a quick thinker.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ready, Get Pet ... Go PLUTO!/ Figaro's New Friend!
programme.desc: When pets are allowed to join their owners on a race, Pluto and Pete's dog Butch try to upstage each other. The Happy Helpers look after Pluto, and Figaro gets jealous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Donald's Garage/ Artful Helpers
programme.desc: While Mickey is away, Donald is left in charge and tries to improve the garage. The Happy Helpers are asked to guard a valuable painting at the Hot Dog Hills' Fancy Art Museum.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Robot/ PJ Power Up
programme.desc: Gekko befriends a mini-robot that Romeo uses to infiltrate HQ. PJ Robot finds a part of HQ that gives the PJs cool new powers.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Romeo's Action Toys/ The Dragon Gong
programme.desc: Romeo turns Owlette's Flossy Flash figure into a device that transforms the other PJ Masks into action toys! Night Ninja steals an ancient gong to awaken a real Dragon!

programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!

programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Mutiny
programme.desc: Kragan buys a secret weapon to capture the Colossus and take over. When Synara discovers this plan she tries to warn Kaz and crew, but it may be too late!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Not the Mama
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: I Only Have Eyes for Goo/ Talk Blobbish To Me
programme.desc: Thanks to a cursed prescription, Wendy's new glasses allow her to read minds.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Jack Takes a Tumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Critical Update
programme.desc: Doc Ock, in Spider-Man/Peter Parker's body, adjusts to his new life as a hero. He finds ways to streamline his methods into a more efficient (albeit much less friendly) approach.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Impatient Patient
programme.desc: Even though he is clearly sick, Hiro refuses to listen to Baymax or his teammates and insists that he should not stay on the sidelines during a battle with the Mad Jacks.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Aiger vs. Phi!
programme.desc: Prior to their match, Aiger has predictions that Phi may succeed in destroying Achilles once again. Aiger's defense-based strategy is proved useless when it's declared the match will be decided by Burst Finish only.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Movie: Cooking With Love
programme.desc: Fun with a side of love ensues as a television producer and a cook are paired on a children's cooking show.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.

programme.title: South Park: World War Zimmerman
programme.desc: Cartman sees Token as a threat to all humanity.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love
programme.desc: Cartman finally lets a special someone knows exactly how he feels about them.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime 2000
programme.desc: Cartman is pursued by the FBI for committing a hate crime against Token and lands in juvenile hall.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: January 8, 2020
programme.desc: Mo Rocca, correspondent for 'CBS Sunday Morning' visits.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade: Justin Martindale, Erik Griffin and Morgan Stewart
programme.desc: Panelists Justin Martindale, Erik Griffin and Morgan Stewart join David Spade to talk about the latest in pop culture.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: South Park: Taming Strange
programme.desc: Kyle's brother Ike is finally growing up leading to them to lose touch. To keep things from drifting apart, Kyle takes Ike to a Yo Gabba Gabba show.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah
programme.desc: A reality-based look at news, trends, pop culture, current events and politics with Trevor Noah.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.desc: Chris Cuomo speaks with Paris Lee Bennet to find out why he killed his sister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: The wolfpack prepares for their first wedding in the bush. Emotions run high as the family prepares to welcome a new member, and the Browns struggle to keep a project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Born to Run
programme.desc: Bart the Bear faces the mightiest human yet in national arm-wrestling champion Bruce. Honey Bump schools Jersey girl Christina when it comes to running anything but her mouth. MMA fighter Jesse fights for a chance at a cage match with a grizzly.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Alone: Man Up or Bow Out
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: An all-star survivalist heads into the badlands of South Africa where ferocious lions and hyenas are on the prowl, forcing him to kill in order to win.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Family First
programme.desc: Barn construction is all hands-on deck, but the family confronts Bam when he chooses to pay more attention to his own projects.

programme.desc: The Browns move into their new home and look toward the future. After living in the same house as the family for 32 years, Matt creates his own one-of-a-kind tire house. Ami enlists the help of an Alaskan matchmaker to find mates for her five grown boys.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears

programme.title: Epic Bar Builds: The Smallest British Pub
